notes: FGAP execution context: outbound open_question_blocks_decision at depth 1 surfaces which DEC this gap blocks; inbound friction_item_files_to_gap at depth 1 surfaces FB items grounding the gap (cross-substrate sentinel form receives FB→project:FGAP edges; in-substrate FGAP-NNN receives the in-substrate FB→FGAP-NNN form). Composes the bundle a coder needs at FGAP closure time: what decision unblocks, what friction grounds the closure.
